scripts.deploy:generic: npm run build:generic && firebase deploy --only hosting:generic
scripts.deploy:jw: npm run build:jw && firebase deploy --only hosting:jw
scripts.build:dev: npm run apply-canary-assets && turbo run build
scripts.build:dev:generic: npm run apply-canary-assets && turbo run build --filter=@avalia/quiz
scripts.build:dev:jw: npm run apply-canary-assets && turbo run build --filter=@avalia/jw-quiz
